title: Yomi's Joban Client Mod
description: A compatible and improved version of Joban Client Mod.
body:
# Yomi's Joban Client Mod

This mod is a **compatible and enhanced fork** of the original [Joban Client Mod (JCM)](https://modrinth.com/project/lQqKCDhg).  
It is specifically designed to work with **[YMTR](https://modrinth.com/project/U75MCH6y)** (Unofficial MTR fork).


## Why This Fork Exists

The original JCM relies on specific internal APIs of the official MTR mod.  
YMTR (my fork of MTR) modifies some of those APIs, making the original JCM incompatible.  
**YJCM is a necessary adaptation** – it allows YMTR users to continue using JCM-like features without losing functionality.


## Significant Differences from Original JCM

- **Full compatibility with YMTR** – The original JCM does NOT work with YMTR. This fork bridges that gap.
- **Sound Looper now supports web audio streaming** (`.wav` format only)
- **Compatibility with YMTR’s creative mode inventory tabs**
  
  More features may be added in future updates!


## Precautions for Web Audio Streaming

- Audio must be in **WAV format** (OGG/MP3 cannot be played)
- Ensure the URL is **safe**
- Do not stream network audio too frequently to avoid stuttering
